name: macos-mail-mcp
description: MCP server connecting Claude to macOS Mail.app via AppleScript

scripts.build: tsc && chmod 755 build/index.js && npm run copy-scripts
scripts.copy-scripts: cp src/bridge/escape-for-json.applescript build/bridge/ && cd src && find domains -name '*.applescript' -exec sh -c 'mkdir -p "../build/$(dirname "$1")" && cp "$1" "../build/$1"' _ {} \;
